intended_use: BriefCase is a radiological computer aided triage and notification software indicated for use in the analysis of head CTA images in adults or transitional adolescents aged 18 and older. The device is
intended_use_full: BriefCase is a radiological computer aided triage and notification software indicated for use in the analysis of head CTA images in adults or transitional adolescents aged 18 and older. The device is intended to assist hospital networks and appropriately trained medical specialists in workflow triage by flagging and communication of M1 Large Vessel Occlusion (M1-LVO) pathologies.
ground_truth: Reviewer assessment of presence or absence of M1-LVO on head CTA images
